_meta.purpose: Good / Better / Best ladder definitions driving the tier-switcher in the cart + PDF + Impact Calculator.

good.rationale: Light-duty walkway segregation for low-speed, low-volume foot + MHE traffic.

better.rationale: Standard 3-rail pedestrian barrier for typical mixed forklift + pedestrian aisles.

best.rationale: Newer high-rated pedestrian barrier for critical or high-frequency zones.

good.rationale: Entry-level single-rail traffic barrier for low-speed vehicles.

better.rationale: Standard A-SAFE single-rail traffic barrier for typical forklift zones.

best.rationale: Upgrade to double-rail for heavier vehicles + higher impact speeds.

good.rationale: Entry-level combo barrier with one traffic rail + one pedestrian rail.

better.rationale: Standard combo barrier balancing traffic and pedestrian protection.

best.rationale: Dual traffic rails + pedestrian rail for heaviest mixed-traffic aisles.

good.rationale: Single-rail rack-end protection for standard aisles.

better.rationale: Double-rail for deeper forklift impacts on rack end frames.

best.rationale: Full-height topple protection for critical racking or shared aisles.

good.rationale: 90° corner guard for light side impacts on walls and equipment edges.

better.rationale: Wrap-around column guard for typical warehouse columns.

best.rationale: Extended wrap with spacer sets for heavy impacts on wider columns.

good.rationale: Baseline topple protection for low/medium-bay racking.

better.rationale: Taller topple barrier for medium-bay warehouses.

best.rationale: Full-height topple protection for high-bay or critical zones.
